title: From #general
headline: And one more... I joined Appodeal four years ago. And like in any relationship, ...
quote: And one more... I joined Appodeal four years ago. And like in any relationship, there were plenty of good moments and not only. In any case, it’s been an interesting, exciting and definitely valuable journey. I’m really glad I got to meet many great people along the way - people I got to know better
author: Illia Zaleski

title: From #general
headline: Better late than sorry — yes, it took me embarrassingly long to give Claude Code...
quote: Better late than sorry — yes, it took me embarrassingly long to give Claude Code a real shot. Previously I recommended Cursor as the go-to for vibe coding. My position has changed. I now recommend Claude Code as the primary tool. Why the switch: • Much broader community and ecosystem around it • Ver
author: Pavel Golubev
